Fantasy Island (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,441,782Details
International Box Office $22,624,494
Worldwide Box Office $49,066,276
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,024,478
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $831,188
Total $1,855,666
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The enigmatic Mr. Roarke makes the secret dreams of his lucky guests come true at a luxurious but remote tropical resort. But when the fantasies turn into nightmares, the guests have to solve the island’s mystery in order to escape with their lives.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,310,420 (46.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,784 opening theaters/2,784 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,449,201

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2020 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Trinidad)
February 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Switzerland)
February 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Philippines)
February 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Indonesia)
February 12th, 2020 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: April 14th, 2020 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
July 13th, 2020 by Sony Pictures, released as Blumhouse’s Fantasy Island
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, terror, drug content, suggestive material and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2611 (Cert #52515), 1/8/2020)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake with a Different Genre
Plot point: Accidental Death, Bullies, Revenge, Surprise Twist, Tortured as Punishment, Wish Granters, Zombies
Social setting: Supernatural
Source material: Modern Adaptation
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Columbia Pictures, Tower of Babble
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
